title: T-112 — D365 Sync Audit screen (SET-083 §11.3)
prompt:
# T-112 — D365 Sync Audit screen (SET-083 §11.3)

PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md §11.3 (D365 Admin UI)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build SET-083 D365 Sync Audit — last N (default 100) sync results + per-row error details + manual trigger button. Read from `d365_sync_runs` table (per T-030 schema). Manual trigger calls T-030 triggerD365Sync action.

## Implementation contract
1. Page at apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/audit/page.tsx (Server Component) reads last 100 d365_sync_runs rows for caller's org_id ordered by started_at DESC.
2. List columns: started_at, finished_at, direction (pull|push), entity_type, status (ok|partial|failed), rows_in / rows_ok / rows_failed, error_summary.
3. Toolbar: status filter, direction filter, date range filter, 'Run sync now' button (calls T-030 triggerD365Sync).
4. Per-row 'View errors' link opens read-only modal with full error JSON (errors[] array).
5. RBAC: requires `settings.integrations.read`; manual trigger requires `owner` per §11.4.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/audit/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/audit/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` array.

## Test strategy
1. RED: RTL test seeds 5 sync runs with mixed status; asserts filter, error modal, manual trigger button RBAC gating.
   `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/integrations/d365/audit/page.test.tsx`
2. RED must fail.
3. GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + modal + trigger wiring.
4. Re-run RED + `pnpm typecheck` + `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass withOrgContext (RLS).
- Do not auto-retry from UI (worker handles retries; this is read-only viewer + manual trigger).
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (§0).

Stack: TS + Next.js App Router + Drizzle + pnpm + vitest + Playwright + Server Actions. PRD: 02-SETTINGS-PRD.md v3.5.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 Sync Audit (SET-083): last N sync runs viewer + filters + per-row error modal + owner-gated manual trigger.
pipeline_inputs.details: PRD §11.3 SET-083: `Last N sync results + errors + manual trigger`. The 'Run sync now' button must be disabled for non-owner roles per §11.4 (flag flip + ops both require owner). Error JSON modal renders raw payload — no parsing/categorization in scope.
acceptance_criteria: Given 5 d365_sync_runs rows exist with mixed status (ok/partial/failed), when the page renders, then 5 rows are listed in started_at DESC order with status badges.
Given the user filters status='failed' and direction='push', when the list re-renders, then only failed push runs are visible.
Given the user clicks 'View errors' on a failed row, when the modal opens, then the raw errors[] JSON renders read-only.
Given the caller lacks `owner` role, when they view the page, then the 'Run sync now' button is disabled with an aria-label explaining insufficient permissions.
test_strategy: RED: RTL test seeds runs + asserts filter, error modal, manual-trigger RBAC disable.
GREEN: implement Server Component + filters + modal + trigger wiring.
risk_red_lines: Do not auto-retry from UI (worker handles retries; this is read-only viewer + manual trigger).
